title: botrychium ternatum var. nipponicum
intro: Botrychium ternatum var. nipponicum, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a variety of the fern plant that belongs to the genus Botrychium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Japanese lady fern include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
